phases: Phase 1: ci_coverage_lint module + Step 0.6 wiring + doctrine bullet + tests

limitations: V1 Python-fingerprint heuristic (python ... / pytest ...); non-Python checks out of scope (covers issue origination case); WARN-only; tag-only workflows skipped; env-setup boilerplate filtered
non_goals: full bash AST parsing; cross-workflow dependency graphing; substantiate-time re-assert (deferred follow-on); workflow-comment-annotation exemptions (use plan-side ## CI Coverage Exemptions block instead); auto-suggestion of exemption rationale
exclusions: no changes to release.yml, ci.yml, pr-lint.yml; lint consumed by /qor-audit Step 0.6 only; no VETO binding in V1
